app.batch_size_invalid: Batch size must be -1 or greater than zero.

error.audio_file_not_found: The specified audio file was not found.

error.chart_format_brackets_mismatch: Chart format lists must use matching [ and ] brackets.

error.chart_format_unsupported: Unsupported chart format '{0}'. Supported values are mgxc, ugc, and sus.
error.effect_file_not_found: The specified background effect file was not found.
error.file_ignored_due_to_id_missing: This file is ignored since Song ID is missing. Set a number for Song Id in Margrete.
error.file_not_found: The specified file was not found.
error.invalid_header: The header {0} in the chart file does not match {1}.
error.jacket_file_not_found: The specified jacket file was not found.
error.preview_stop_greater_than_start: The preview stop time must be greater than the start time.
error.size_incompatible: Expected to read {0} bytes for {1} but only got {2}.
error.stage_background_required: A background path is required to build a stage.

hint.preview_value_clamped: Preview {0} time ({1:F3} s) exceeds the maximum value ({2:F3} s) and has been clamped to prevent overflow.

mg.concurrent_ex_effects: Different EX effects coexist at the same tick: {0}. The game will only display one of these.
mg.head_bpm_not_found: No BPM change event was found at tick 0.
mg.head_time_signature_event_not_found: No Time Signature event was found at bar 0. Defaulting to a 4/4 time signature.
mg.length_smaller_than_unit: Nodes in the original lengthy note having spacing less than 1/{1}.
mg.main_timeline_not_found: There was no events found on main TIL {0}.
mg.meta_argument_count_min_one: Command '{0}' requires at least one argument.
mg.meta_first_argument_must_int: First argument must be a valid integer.
mg.no_sortname_provided: No SortName was provided. A new SortName has been generated from the Title.
mg.note_overlapped_in_different_til: This note overlaps with note in other TILs. This may cause problems in the scroll speed of this note.
mg.overlapping_air_parent_slide: Due to multiple overlapping Slide nodes existing simultaneously on this Air's position, it is unknown to determine from which Slide node the Air should start. Please try to space them apart in single ticks.
mg.string_id_not_found: The specified StringID (id or str) {0} could not be found in '{1}'. Please check your input or run "Recollect Game Assets" to refresh the database. If you want to use your custom StringID, please provide both (i.e. "#meta ... [ID] [String]").

warn.duplicate_id_and_difficulty: Multiple charts with the same song ID and difficulty exist, the last scanned file will be used.
warn.more_than_one_chart_marked_main: Multiple charts for this Song ID have been tagged with `#meta main` in their comments. The first chart found with this tag will be set as the baseline difficulty.
warn.no_chart_marked_main: No baseline difficulty for this Song ID. Selecting the highest-difficulty chart by default. To choose a baseline difficulty explicitly, add `#meta main` to the comment of the chart.
warn.preview_later_than_120: The preview start time is set later than 120 seconds. This may cause the game to freeze when selecting the song.
warn.we_chart_must_be_unique_id: World's End chart must use unique Song ID; otherwise, other difficulty charts will not display under common song categories.
